fundamentals.name: Accenture plc
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Accenture plc provides strategy and consulting, industry X, song, and technology and operation services in the Americas, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia Pacific. It offers systems integration and application management; security; intelligent platform; infrastructure; software engineering; data, AI, cloud; and automation and global delivery services. The company also operates business processes for specific enterprise functions, including finance and accounting, sourcing and procurement, supply chain, marketing and sales, and human resources, as well as industry-specific services, such as platform trust and safety, banking, insurance, network and health services; and designs, manufactures, and assembles automation equipment, robotics, and other commercial hardware products. It serves communications, media, and technology; financial services; banking and capital markets, and insurance; health and public service; consumer goods, retail, travel services; industrial; life science; and chemicals, natural resources, energy, and utilities sectors. Accenture plc has collaboration with Amazon Web Services (AWS) to deliver transformative digital services to public sector, defense, and national security organizations. It has a collaboration with OpenAI to help enterprise clients unlock new levels of innovation and growth by bringing agentic AI systems; and has a strategic collaboration with Microsoft and Avanade for the development of an agentic factory intelligence system. It also has strategic partnership with Netomi, Inc. to help enterprises reinvent customer experience using agentic AI systems. Accenture plc was founded in 1951 and is based in Dublin, Ireland.

judgment.summary: Accenture is a well-established, profitable company with solid growth and strong cash flow, trading at a reasonable valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 3.3%; next earnings date is 2026-06-18.
positives: Revenue growth 8.3% YoY, with analyst estimates for the current fiscal year at 7.3%.
Operating margin of 13.8% and profit margin of 10.6% indicate efficient operations.
Return on equity at 24.8% demonstrates strong profitability relative to shareholder equity.
Free cash flow of $12.16B TTM provides significant financial flexibility.
Forward P/E of 11.97x is attractive given the company's growth prospects and stability.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 25.47% indicates some leverage, though manageable given cash flow.
Quarterly earnings growth of 2.1% is modest.
PEG ratio of 1.24 suggests the stock might be slightly ahead of its growth rate.

news.paragraph: Accenture's stock is seeing upward momentum following news of a new AI partnership with Mitsubishi Chemical in Japan. This deal aims to leverage AI for new ventures, building on the company's ongoing focus in the artificial intelligence space. While recent headlines have also touched on potential AI disruption and a DCF valuation suggesting upside, the market appears to be reacting positively to the new strategic alliance.
